block_00:
How to dip your toes
into trading, safely.
block_01: The most cost common question our support team gets from new traders is “How do I get started if I’ve never traded before?”. We know how intimidating the platform may seem to a newbie, especially considering the risks online trading carries. But the truth is there are ways to get into trading safely.
block_03: Some people like to learn by doing, while others learn by watching. If you’re the type that would rather observe first, check out the
block_07: Another safe option to get acquainted with a trading instrument is to use a Practice Account. You’re not risking any real investments, but get infinite opportunities to experiment with a
block_10: Make sure you don’t rush into things by going “all in” with your funds. Once you’ve identified an instrument and a strategy you’d like to give a try, start by making modest investments. A rule of thumb many experienced traders stick to is to never invest more than 2% of their balance at any given time.
block_11: And remember: slow and steady wins the race. Spending an adequate amount of time on market research, analysis and strategy testing will give you a tremendous advantage in the world of trading.
